About Us

The

Directorate of Quality and Strategy Development

supports Kadir Has University’s quality assurance system by monitoring and evaluating institutional performance in

research, education, and societal contribution

. Its mission is to identify areas for improvement and ensure that strategic actions are effectively planned and implemented.

The Directorate operates under the authority of the

Vice Rectorate for Legal, Ethics and Legal Compliance, Quality and Internal Audit

, in line with the

Kadir Has University Quality Assurance Directive, Strategic Plan, and the standards of the Higher Education Quality Council of Türkiye (YÖKAK).

Key Responsibilities:

Promoting and embedding a culture of quality across the University.

Coordinating the activities of the University’s Quality Commission.

Managing internal and external evaluation processes, including YÖKAK reviews.

Designing and analyzing institutional surveys to guide decision-making.

Enhancing the University’s visibility in national and international rankings.
